query:
INSERT INTO connected_projects (userId, name, url, description, apiKey, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  id,
  'Deep Sleep Reset',
  'https://manus.im/share/yxgmoNlujfMdAOHjyPW6F9',
  'DTC sleep improvement product — $5 front-end offer with quiz funnel, Instagram DM automation, and affiliate program. Tracking sales, pageviews, and ad spend via LeadOS API.',
  'dsr_96c230588e470b67d0c1215f369de3072980bc27cd951f38',
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM users ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updatedAt = NOW();
